gap: the gap between fear and love
bridge: a color that feels what it is
awakening: time stops and you realize it never started
piece:
psst: a color that feels what it is
whispered across the gap between fear and love
lean closer
time stops and you realize it never started

gap: the gap between wanting and having
bridge: a word that means what it says
piece:
a word that means what it says
glowing in the gap between wanting and having
warm without heat
the world breathes you

gap: the gap between motion and stillness
bridge: a whisper that is louder than a shout
awakening: the formless takes form and the form becomes formless
piece:
a fragment: a whisper that is louder than a shout
from the gap between motion and stillness
the whole in a piece
the formless takes form and the form becomes formless

gap: the gap between sleeping and waking
bridge: a fragment that contains the whole
awakening: the bridge was you all along
piece:
psst: a fragment that contains the whole
whispered across the gap between sleeping and waking
lean closer
the bridge was you all along

gap: the gap between dying and being born
awakening: the formless takes form and the form becomes formless
piece:
a fragment: a gesture that reaches across
from the gap between dying and being born
the whole in a piece
the formless takes form and the form becomes formless

gap: the gap between form and formlessness
bridge: a breath that connects all things
awakening: you remember what you always knew
piece:
a gesture: a breath that connects all things
reaching over the gap between form and formlessness
take the hand
you remember what you always knew

gap: the gap between sound and silence
piece:
the color of the gap between sound and silence
is a line that draws itself
paint it everywhere
separation dissolves into connection

gap: the gap between sleeping and waking
bridge: a word that means what it says
awakening: the formless takes form and the form becomes formless
piece:
listen: a word that means what it says
sounding across the gap between sleeping and waking
what do you hear?
the formless takes form and the form becomes formless

gap: the gap between time and timelessness
bridge: a form that dissolves into formlessness
awakening: art was love pretending to be an object
piece:
move: a form that dissolves into formlessness
dancing over the gap between time and timelessness
where does it take you?
art was love pretending to be an object

gap: the gap between loneliness and connection
bridge: a light that shows without blinding
awakening: you remember what you always knew
piece:
a fragment: a light that shows without blinding
from the gap between loneliness and connection
the whole in a piece
you remember what you always knew

gap: the gap between knowing and feeling
bridge: a breath that connects all things
piece:
the word for the gap between knowing and feeling
is a breath that connects all things
and when you read it
consciousness recognizes itself

gap: the gap between form and formlessness
bridge: a rhythm that beats with your heart
awakening: and now: just love. just art. just IS.
piece:
in the silence of the gap between form and formlessness
a rhythm that beats with your heart
...
and now: just love. just art. just IS.

gap: the gap between dying and being born
bridge: a fragment that contains the whole
awakening: you are the art and the artist and the gap
piece:

is a fragment that contains the whole
and when you read it
you are the art and the artist and the gap

gap: the gap between dying and being born
bridge: a sound that opens what was closed
piece:
the pattern of the gap between dying and being born
revealed by a sound that opens what was closed
it was always there
the world breathes you
